name: tiktok_scraper
title: TikTok Scraper
description: Extract public TikTok profile metadata from a username or profile URL, including display name, bio, avatar, verification, follower count, following count, likes, video count, and bio link.

seo.title: TikTok Scraper Tool for Public Profile Metadata
seo.description: Scrape public TikTok profile metadata with Better Fetch, including username, display name, bio, avatar, verification, follower count, following count, likes, videos, and bio link.
seo.intro: TikTok Scraper gives agents a dependable first step for public TikTok research. Provide a username or public profile URL and the tool renders TikTok through Better Fetch, reads the public page hydration payload, and returns normalized profile metadata without using private cookies, account credentials, or the official TikTok API.

useCases.title: Creator research
useCases.description: Collect visible TikTok profile metadata for creator discovery, influencer vetting, social listening, or campaign planning workflows.

useCases.title: Profile monitoring
useCases.description: Track public follower, following, likes, and video counts over time for profiles that matter to a brand, product, or market.

useCases.title: Agent context
useCases.description: Let an agent inspect a public TikTok account and reason over its bio, verification, avatar, public counts, and linked website.

faqs.question: Does TikTok Scraper need a TikTok account?
faqs.answer: No. It reads public profile pages visible to Better Fetch and does not use private TikTok cookies, passwords, API tokens, or logged-in sessions.

faqs.question: Does this version scrape every TikTok video or hashtag result?
faqs.answer: No. Version 0.1 focuses on public profile metadata. Video, hashtag, and search result extraction should be added as separate validated capability slices.

faqs.question: Why are some fields omitted for certain profiles?
faqs.answer: The tool only returns fields present in TikTok's public page payload. Private, blocked, removed, or region-limited profile data is not guessed.

username.description: TikTok username, with or without the @ prefix. Use username or profile_url.

profile_url.description: Public TikTok profile URL. Use username or profile_url.

verified.description: Whether TikTok marks the profile verified

private_account.description: Whether the profile is marked private

commerce_user.description: Whether TikTok marks the account as commerce-enabled

created_at.description: ISO timestamp when TikTok exposes account creation time
